dashboard.heatmapSubtitle: P&L result · Click on a day

mtf.signalBullStrong: Strong buy zone — RSI oversold + VMC very negative. High rebound potential. Wait for a reversal confirmation before entering.
mtf.signalBullMod: Bullish bias — Indicators show upward momentum. RSI is recovering from low zones and VMC confirms.
mtf.signalBearStrong: Strong sell zone — RSI overbought + VMC very positive. High correction risk. Consider taking profits or shorting.
mtf.signalBearMod: Bearish bias — Momentum is weakening. RSI is elevated and VMC indicates increasing selling pressure.
mtf.signalNeutral: Neutral zone — No clear directional signal. Indicators are balanced. Wait for a stronger signal.

analyse.contextBullFavorable: Favorable buy conditions — strongly bearish MTF (contrarian signal)
analyse.contextBullMod: Moderate bearish bias — watching support levels
analyse.contextBearFavorable: Favorable sell conditions — strongly bullish MTF (contrarian signal)
analyse.contextBearMod: Moderate bullish bias — watching resistance levels
analyse.contextNeutral: Market without clear direction — wait for signal confirmation
analyse.levelsDesc1: Highs and lows over the last 20 and 50 candles (4H for crypto, 1D for stocks).
analyse.levelsDesc2: Candles with high body ratio (>60%) followed by an impulsive move in the opposite direction (3 confirmation candles).
analyse.levelsDesc3: Number of touches of the level (≥3 touches = strong). Nearby levels (<0.5%) are merged.
analyse.heroSearchSub: Crypto, stocks, forex — type a symbol in the search bar to start analysis
analyse.screenshotHeroSub: Upload a chart screenshot — GPT-4o Vision analyzes structure, key zones and generates a trade plan
analyse.orClickToSelect: or click to select · PNG, JPG, WebP
analyse.screenshotCardSub: Upload chart → GPT-4o Vision → Full analysis

journal.title: Emotional Journal
journal.subtitle: Emotional tracking & psychology
journal.notesPlaceholder: How are you feeling? What influences your mood?
journal.noDataForAnalysis: Add entries to get an analysis of your emotional profile
journal.strongPositiveImpact: Your emotions positively influence your performance. Keep cultivating this mindset!
journal.weakPositiveImpact: Slight positive correlation between your emotions and performance.
journal.noImpact: Your emotions have no significant impact on your performance.
journal.weakNegativeImpact: Your emotions slightly affect your performance. Work on emotional management.
journal.strongNegativeImpact: Warning! Your emotions negatively impact your performance. Time to work on emotional discipline.
journal.insightHighVolatility: ⚡ Your emotional volatility is high — your states change frequently
journal.insightStableState: 🎯 Your emotional state is very stable and consistent
journal.insightHighIntensity: 🔥 You experience your emotions with high intensity — stay grounded
journal.insightLowIntensity: 😌 Your emotions are experienced with low intensity — good self-control
journal.insightPositiveCorr: 📈 Your positive emotions are correlated with good performance
journal.insightNegativeCorr: 📉 Your negative emotions seem to impact your results
journal.insightNeutralCorr: 🔄 Your performance seems independent of your emotional state
journal.insightStress: ⚠️ {{pct}}% of entries are in difficult states (stress/fear/frustration)
journal.recBreathing: 🧘 Practice deep breathing or meditation before trading
journal.recAvoidStressed: 🚫 Avoid placing orders when you feel stressed — take a break
journal.recProfitTargets: 📏 Set clear profit targets and stick to them strictly
journal.recStopLoss: 🛡️ Use strict stop-losses to protect your capital
journal.recDecompress: ⏸️ After a loss, take time to decompress before trading again
journal.recAnalyzeErrors: 📓 Analyze your mistakes without judgment to learn from them
journal.recCultivate: 🌟 Keep cultivating this mindset — it supports performance
journal.recRefineStrategy: 📊 Take advantage of this positive period to refine your strategy
journal.recOvertrading: ⚖️ Excitement can lead to overtrading — stick to your plan
journal.recDoubleCheck: 📐 Double-check your setups before entering a position
journal.recKeepLogging: 📅 Keep logging your emotional states regularly to know yourself better
journal.recReduceSize: 🎛️ Your emotional volatility is high — reduce position sizes to lower stress
journal.recCoaching: 🤝 Consider coaching or mindfulness techniques to improve your emotional management

systemes.title: Systems
systemes.empty: No systems. Create your first trading system.

desc.str_weekend: Trade on a Saturday and Sunday
desc.str_alldays: At least 1 trade Mon→Fri in a week
desc.jrn_recover: Go from Frustrated to Calm between 2 trades, 5 times
desc.jrn_stable: No negative emotion over 20 consecutive trades
desc.jrn_stoic: 50 trades (wins AND losses) all with Calm emotion
desc.risk_fortress: No trade > 2% loss over 100 consecutive trades
desc.risk_neversl: 10 winning trades closed before SL with >2R
desc.mkt_multi2: At least 10 trades on 2 different markets
desc.mkt_multi3: At least 10 trades on 3 different markets
desc.pnl_comeback: Recover from a -10%+ drawdown to ATH
desc.soc_passive: Earn 1000 passive XP total via referrals
desc.ch_week: All challenges of a week completed
desc.ch_3in1: Complete 3 challenges in the same day
desc.ai_bias1: The Coach detects a bias for the 1st time
desc.ai_biasfix: A recurring bias is no longer detected over 10 trades
desc.ai_allbias: The Coach has detected all 5 biases at least once
desc.ai_memory: The Coach has saved 20+ memories about you
desc.ai_improve: The Coach signals an improvement over 1 month
desc.sea_newyear: 5 trades in the 1st week of January
desc.sea_bf: Trade on Black Friday with positive P&L
desc.sea_appbday: Trade on the app's anniversary day
desc.hum_revenge: The Coach detects revenge trading 3 times
desc.hum_bhsl: 3 consecutive trades bought at the high
desc.hum_comeback: Losing streak then 5 consecutive winning trades
desc.sec_midnight: Record a trade at exactly midnight
desc.sec_lucky7: 7 winning trades on the 7th or P&L containing 777
desc.sec_fullmoon: Winning trade on a full moon day
desc.sec_speed: Open and close a trade in <60s with a gain

hero.subtitle: TradeMindset combines a trading journal, AI-powered behavioural analysis and gamification to transform your habits and boost your performance.

how.label: How it works
how.title: From trade entry to progress, in 3 steps

step1.title: Journal your trades
step1.desc: Log every trade with setup, emotion and screenshot. AI analyses it instantly to detect patterns.

step2.title: Receive your AI insights
step2.desc: Identified biases, emotion–P&L correlations, personalised recommendations for your trading style.

step3.title: Progress & Earn XP
step3.desc: Badges, levels, streaks. Every good habit is rewarded. Discipline becomes a game.

journal.title: AI Journal
journal.desc: Record every trade with your emotions. AI identifies your behavioural patterns and the biases costing you money.

behavioral.title: Behavioural analysis
behavioral.desc: FOMO, revenge trading, overconfidence — detect and correct your biases before they strike.

stats.title: Advanced statistics
stats.desc: Win rate, expectancy, profit factor, max drawdown — all your KPIs on one screen, in real time.

predict.title: Predict & Earn
predict.desc: Predict crypto prices, earn XP for every correct prediction and climb the leaderboard.

gamification.title: XP Gamification
gamification.desc: Levels, badges, streaks, titles. Every good habit is rewarded. Discipline becomes addictive.

markets.title: Markets & Alerts
markets.desc: Follow crypto and stocks live, set price alerts and never miss a move again.

thomas.quote: In 3 months I raised my win rate from 52% to 71%. The AI analysis identified that I was cutting winners too early after a loss. Game changer.
thomas.author: Thomas M.

sarah.quote: The journal showed me that my worst trades happen on Monday mornings. Simple, but I'd never have seen it without the data. I now avoid trading that day.
sarah.author: Sarah K.

alexis.quote: The gamification is exactly what I needed to stay disciplined. I have a 47-day journal streak. Before, I'd quit after a week.
alexis.author: Alexis B.
